examples: Native speakers can distinguish between grammatical and ungrammatical sentences even when they have never heard particular combinations before.
Some films have strange names and ungrammatical structures.
The tea parties, remember, also started with little more than a (strikingly ungrammatical) cry of pain.
Its current voice is similar to that of the many Incredible Hulk parodies on Twitter: belligerent, ungrammatical, often expressed in all caps.
